page: Microsoft Azure DC16ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCADSv5 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 16 dedicated virtual CPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced resource allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type includes 614 GB of local disk storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage options. Virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance does not include any integrated graphics processing units and is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio provide predictable performance for general-purpose workloads. The inclusion of local storage and Premium Storage compatibility makes this instance suitable for database hosting, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require dedicated compute resources without GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC16ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance from the DCADSv5 family, built on the x86_64 architecture with an AMD processor. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V, the instance includes 614 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not contain any GPUs and comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable performance, making this server well-suited for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, and web serving applications that require consistent resource availability and local storage capacity without the need for hardware acceleration.
